---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new module, probe, benchmark, or documentation improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Proposal

What should be added or changed?

## Research Or Engineering Claim

What measurable claim would this support?

## Validation Plan

How should this be tested, benchmarked, or documented?

## Non-Claims Boundary

Confirm this does not introduce claims of consciousness, sentience,
phenomenology, personhood, subjective experience, or autonomous moral agency.
